title: episcia hastata
intro: Episcia hastata, also known as the 'Rainbow Plant' or 'Episcia', is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae. It is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties. Episcia hastata has been found to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to reduce swelling, fight off infections, and alleviate symptoms of fever. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and poultices, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions.
